objects.name: Atlassian security advisory (AV26-483)
objects.description: Serial number: AV26-483 Date: May 19, 2026 On May 19, 2026, Atlassian published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities, including some critical ones, in the following products: Bamboo Data Center and Server - multiple versions Bitbucket Data Center and Server - multiple versions Confluence Data Center and Server - multiple versions Fisheye/Crucible - versions 4.9.0 to 4.9.9 Jira Data Center and Server - multiple versions Jira Service Management Data Center and Server - multiple versions The Cyber Centre encourages users...
